name: Chicken and Roasted Pepper Soup
recipeIngredient: 1 whole chicken breasts, skinless and boneless
recipeInstructions:
1. Set oven to broil.
2. Place the chicken on a rack in the broiler pan. Position the broiler pan so that the top of the chicken is 5 to 7 inches from the heat source.
3. Broil the chicken for 15 minutes, turning it once halfway through cooking until it reaches an internal temperature of 165°F (74°C).
4. Cut the cooked chicken into strips measuring about 1/4 inch in width.
5. Add the roasted peppers and chopped onion to a blender or food processor. Cover and blend until smooth.
6. Pour the blended mixture, chicken broth, lime juice, cilantro, salt, pepper, and garlic into a 2-quart saucepan.
7. Heat the mixture over medium-high heat until it reaches boiling point, then reduce the heat to low.
8. Simmer for 15 minutes before adding the chopped chicken and cubed jicama.
9. Stir well and continue cooking until heated through.
10. Serve 4 servings.
